data.name: 巨乳豐臀BBA騎士團
data.detailed_description:
故事:

巨乳豐臀BBA騎士團！ ~強大女騎士也無法戰勝的大雕！廢柴屌絲弱雞男主，又掉進了異世界裡。然後遇到了漂亮又火辣的強大女騎士團。然而英勇無敵，面對任何敵人都決不屈服的BBA騎士團的精英女騎士們~卻無條件地降服在廢柴男主那雄偉的大雕之下…

于是，靠大雕征服并控制了王国的最强骑士团，从而控制了整个王国的男主建立了他的超级大后宫，每天沉浸在异世界王国的酒池肉林之中…

特点:
  • 多于20个与美女皮尔姬特，帕梅拉，玛缇娜， 和希拉H的情节。
  • 从原装日本VN本地化。
  • 高清16:9和4:3图质。
  • 几小时的内容。
  • 所有美女带有日文语音。
  • 带有角色动态。
  • 带有收藏展览。
  • 可使用个人名字来玩！

巨乳丰臀BBA骑士团是一个漢化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所创作。 我们cherry kiss櫻桃社将日本游戏带到全世界

**注意**
所有角色的描述和图片都属成人并没有任何未成年人物用于这游戏里。

data.name: Hot & Steamy Knights
data.detailed_description:
The call of adventure (or "the urge to meet hot babes") burns brightly in our hero's heart as he sets out to sea to explore distant lands! He quickly finds himself in danger as his ship is sunk by some sort of sea monster... Luck is on his side however, as he is washed up on an island where he quickly encounters some beautiful warriors who made short work of the beast that sunk his ship. So begins our hero's plan to spend some hot and steamy nights with these busty mature knights!


  • Over 20 steamy scenes with Brigitte, Pamela, Sheila, and Martina sometimes all four at the same time.
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Customize-able name for the male protagonist

Hot & Steamy Knights is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Our hero's quest to grow his harem appears to be thwarted after his ship is sunk and he washes up on a mysterious island with nothing but his "sword" to keep him safe. Luckily for him he soon encounters mature & beautiful knights who make perfect candidates to spend some hot and steamy nights with!
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
